_comment: Single source of truth for brand visual identity. Inject into BOTH image-gen prompts AND scorer rubric. Lock for 90 days minimum — do not edit during that window. Track which fields you wish you could change; revisit on lock_until date.

primary.name: Royal Violet
primary.use: Logo, primary CTA buttons, brand accent in scenes (e.g. monitor glow, ambient lighting on character)

accent.name: Champagne Gold
accent.use: A-mark in logo, premium signal accents — restrained, never dominant

background_primary.name: Night Navy
background_primary.use: Default background. ALL ads dark mode. No exceptions.

text_primary.name: Slate Off-White
text_primary.use: Headlines (NEVER pure #FFFFFF — too harsh on dark)

data_up.name: Emerald
data_up.use: Bull charts, positive deltas only — never decorative

data_down.name: Red 500
data_down.use: Bear charts, negative deltas only — never decorative

typography.headline_family: Inter Display, SF Pro Display, or equivalent geometric sans
typography.body_family: Inter, SF Pro, or equivalent (same family as headline)
typography.data_numbers: Tabular figures (monospaced numerals) — non-negotiable for any chart/price overlay

protagonist.archetype: Focused young East Asian professional, mid-20s to mid-30s, gender rotating across campaigns
presentation_rules: ALWAYS shown from back, profile, or 3/4 view — NEVER front-facing close-up
Single character per ad — no groups, no teams, no couples
Body language: focused, calm, contemplative — NEVER jumping, fist-pumping, celebrating, dancing
Wardrobe: smart casual / elevated WFH (turtleneck, blazer over tee, minimalist hoodie). Black / charcoal / cream. NO suits, NO athleisure, NO branded merch.
protagonist.diversity: Rotate gender and specific ethnicity (Japanese / Korean / Chinese / SEA features) across campaigns. Diversity within the East Asian target is the variation; do not stretch to Western faces.
forbidden: Recognizable anime/manga IP characters (千早愛音, Genshin, Hololive, etc.)
Cartoon mascots as protagonist in PAID MEDIA ads

scene_world.primary: Modern apartment or studio with city skyline view, evening to late night
specific_anchors: Dual-monitor or ultrawide setup with real-looking trading UI on screen (NOT obviously fake screenshots)
MacBook Pro or equivalent premium laptop visible
Lighting signature: window city lights + warm desk lamp + monitor glow. THIS is the look.
Visible city through window — Tokyo / HK / Singapore / Taipei vibe
secondary_acceptable: Window seat in modern coffee shop, evening, laptop open
Hotel room desk, business traveler, city view
Modern co-working space, low occupancy, late hour
scene_world.time_of_day: Evening to late night ALWAYS. No daylight scenes.
forbidden: Generic 'futuristic AI room' with floating holograms

art_direction.style: Cinematic stylized illustration — Makoto Shinkai / Studio Khara color palette, painterly but not overtly anime; emphasis on light and atmosphere over character detail
art_direction.photography_alternative_for_some_ads: Premium photorealistic — Rolex/Apple ad-grade, shallow depth of field, intentional film grain. Use sparingly (≤30% of campaign mix).
art_direction.lighting_rule: Single dominant warm source (lamp or city lights) + cool monitor accent. NEVER harsh overhead studio lighting. NEVER flat lighting.
composition_rules: Single dominant focal point — eye finds the character within 1 second
Negative space deliberate — at least 30% of canvas is 'breathing room'
Rule of thirds for character placement
Logo top-left OR watermark bottom-right — never both, never centered
Headline ≤ 8 words, subhead ≤ 12 words, single CTA

headline_patterns_preferred: Specific outcome: 'Spotted the NVDA breakout 48h early.'
Pain-point question: 'Tired of trading on noise?'
Calm authority: 'See what your portfolio is hiding.'

video.must_end_with: Logo + CTA on Night Navy (#0A0E1A) background, 1.5-2 sec hold
video.audio: Ambient electronic / lo-fi instrumental — NEVER vocal, NEVER trending TikTok audio
video.captions: Always present, white on semi-transparent dark

must_include_in_every_ad: Alphawalk.ai logo (top-left or bottom-right watermark, never both)
Brand color present (purple element OR gold accent — at least one visible)
Single human protagonist OR pure UI/data shot
must_exclude_from_every_ad: Jumping, fist-pumping, dancing, or hyper-excited people
Real public figures, celebrities, or recognizable IP characters
Comic book speech bubbles or thought clouds
Wealth-fantasy imagery (Lamborghini, money rain, gold bars, private jets)
More than 8 words in headline, more than 12 words in subhead

campaign_consistency_rules._rationale: Brand recognition compounds with repetition. Lock the DNA, vary only message and moment within the locked aesthetic.
